docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, JOJI ELAINE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MCGILL. PLAINTIFF JOJI ELAINE JAMES IS PRESENT VIA ZOOMGOV. DEFENDANT HALLIE MRIZEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FILING WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY JAMES, JOJI ELAINE AS TO DEFENDANT MRIZEK, HALLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-09-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-07-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-10-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MRIZEK, HALLIE
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, JOJI ELAINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMES, JOJI ELAINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MRIZEK, HALLIE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, TERMS/OTHER ORDERS: OR RETURN CAT WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS DECISION BY GIVING THE CAT, MATILDA, TO KIRSTEN MARTIN, OR OTHER PERSON DESIGNATED BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT MRIZEK, HALLIE
